case_title: DILLON CAMPBELL VS. THE FELIX GROUP LLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CAMPBELL, DILLON AS TO DEFENDANT THE FELIX GROUP LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE FELIX GROUP LLC
STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY CAMPBELL, DILLON THE FELIX GROUP LLC
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-18-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DILLON CAMPBELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT THE FELIX GROUP LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEPHEN WASSERMAN, MANAGER. PARTIES REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCE AT JUNE 18TH HEARING THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: GREG GROENVELD; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAMPBELL, DILLON AS TO DEFENDANT THE FELIX GROUP LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED APR-08-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE FELIX GROUP LLC
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PUSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
